verse: Beloved, I wish above all things that thou mayest prosper and be in health, even as thy soul prospereth.
devotional:
Beloved,

Beloved, I wish above all things that thou mayest prosper and be in health, even as thy soul prospereth. — 3 John 1:2

GOD is not silent about your body. HE addresses your health by name. This is not a casual wish from an ordinary man — this is the heart of THE LORD declared through HIS servant. Your health matters to HIM.

Every infirmity that has attached itself to you without invitation, GOD is evicting it today. HE who knit you together in your mother's womb knows every cell, every organ, every pain. Trust HIM fully.

Your healing is not postponed. It is purchased. It was settled on Calvary, and it belongs to you this day.

I declare today that sickness shall not have dominion over you. I command every affliction to bow, IJMN. Your body SHALL function as GOD designed it. To God be the glory.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: Then shalt thou walk in thy way safely, and thy foot shall not stumble. When thou liest down, thou shalt not be afraid: yea, thou shalt lie down, and thy sleep shall be sweet.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

Then shalt thou walk in thy way safely, and thy foot shall not stumble. When thou liest down, thou shalt not be afraid: yea, thou shalt lie down, and thy sleep shall be sweet. — Proverbs 3:23-24

GOD is a covering. Not a thin roof that leaks under pressure — HE is a fortress, tried and proven. When HE says your foot shall not stumble, it is settled in heaven before it is settled on earth.

You need not walk in anxiety today. Every road you will travel, THE LORD has gone before you. Every danger your eyes cannot see, HIS eyes have already addressed.

Lie down tonight without fear. Wake tomorrow without dread. HIS protection is not seasonal — it is constant.

I pray today that no evil shall locate you or yours, IJMN. Your going out and your coming in SHALL be preserved by THE ALMIGHTY. Halleluyah.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: It is a good thing to give thanks unto the LORD, and to sing praises unto thy name, O most High: To shew forth thy lovingkindness in the morning, and thy faithfulness every night.
devotional:
Beloved,

It is a good thing to give thanks unto the LORD, and to sing praises unto thy name, O most High: To shew forth thy lovingkindness in the morning, and thy faithfulness every night. — Psalm 92:1-2

Gratitude is not a response to convenience. It is a discipline of the soul. The Psalmist did not say give thanks when conditions are favourable. HE said it is a GOOD THING — meaning it is right, it is fitting, it is your proper posture before GOD.

Count what HE has done. Not what is pending — what HE has already done. There is enough there to carry you through every hard moment.

Begin this day with thanksgiving. Close it with testimony. HIS lovingkindness was there this morning. HIS faithfulness will be there tonight.

I declare that a spirit of genuine gratitude SHALL arise in you today, IJMN. To God be the glory for all HE has done.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us. — Ephesians 3:20

Your imagination has a ceiling. GOD does not. Whatever you have dared to believe HIM for, HE is able to surpass it. This is not poetry — this is the nature of THE ALMIGHTY declared plainly.

Do not reduce your expectation to what your salary can explain or what your connection can arrange. Your source will never run dry. GOD is your provider, and HE operates above all human systems.

Widen your faith today. The peculiar blessing HE has prepared for you exceeds what you have asked. Receive it with open hands.

I command every blockage to your provision to be dismantled now, IJMN. Your supply SHALL come — pressed down, shaken together, running over. Halleluyah.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: I thank thee, and praise thee, O thou God of my fathers, who hast given me wisdom and might, and hast made known unto me now what we desired of thee: for thou hast now made known unto us the king's business.
devotional:
Beloved,

I thank thee, and praise thee, O thou God of my fathers, who hast given me wisdom and might, and hast made known unto me now what we desired of thee. — Daniel 2:23

Daniel praised GOD before he stood before the king. He settled the matter in the place of prayer first. That is the order. Praise is not the conclusion of the testimony — it is the beginning of the victory.

GOD gave Daniel wisdom in a season of great pressure. HE has not changed. The same GOD who revealed secrets to a young man in Babylon will give you clarity, direction and strength today.

Open your mouth and praise HIM. Not for what is coming — for who HE already is.

I pray today that the wisdom of GOD shall distinguish you in every room you enter, IJMN. Your praise SHALL open doors that no man can shut. To God be the glory. Halleluyah.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: As for God, his way is perfect: the word of the LORD is tried; he is a buckler to all those that trust in him.
devotional:
Beloved,

As for God, his way is perfect: the word of the LORD is tried; he is a buckler to all those that trust in him.

GOD does not stumble. HIS record is perfect. Every promise HE has ever made, HE has kept. When the road before you looks uncertain, remember — you are not following a rumour. You are following a PROVEN GOD.

Trust is not blind. Trust is informed. It is built on evidence. And the evidence of GOD'S faithfulness stretches from Genesis to this very morning. You have seen HIM work before. HE has not changed.

Do not let fear borrow space in your heart today. Give that space to faith. GOD is your buckler — your shield, your covering. Nothing comes to you without passing through HIM first.

I declare today that your trust in GOD SHALL not be put to shame. Every door HE has ordained to open for you SHALL open, IJMN. Your confidence in THE LORD shall be rewarded. To God be the glory.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: Howbeit when he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth: for he shall not speak of himself; but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak: and he will shew you things to come.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

Howbeit when he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth: for he shall not speak of himself; but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak: and he will shew you things to come.

You are not navigating this life alone. THE HOLY SPIRIT is present — not occasionally, not in moments of crisis only — but always. HE is the Spirit of truth. HE does not mislead. HE does not guess. HE knows the path, and HE knows where you are going.

The question is not whether THE HOLY SPIRIT is willing to guide you. The question is whether you are quiet enough to hear HIM. Make room. Slow down. The One who knows things to come is speaking.

I pray today that your ears are opened to THE HOLY SPIRIT. Every deception targeting your life is exposed and silenced, IJMN. HE SHALL lead you in the right path. Halleluyah.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: And the peace of God, which passeth all understanding, shall keep your hearts and minds through Christ Jesus.
devotional:
Beloved,

And the peace of God, which passeth all understanding, shall keep your hearts and minds through Christ Jesus.

This peace GOD offers is not the peace the world manufactures. The world's peace depends on circumstances — when things are calm, there is peace. But the peace of GOD operates in the storm. It surpasses understanding because it does not require explanation. It simply stands guard.

Your heart and your mind are precious territory. The enemy wants them troubled, anxious, scattered. But GOD has stationed a garrison there — HIS own peace — and it is sufficient.

Receive this peace today. Not tomorrow. Today. Cast your cares upon HIM and let HIM replace them with something the world cannot take from you.

I declare that the peace of GOD SHALL keep your heart from every anxiety today, IJMN. You shall not be overwhelmed. Your mind is covered. To God be the glory.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: Remember ye not the former things, neither consider the things of old. Behold, I will do a new thing; now it shall spring forth; shall ye not know it? I will even make a way in the wilderness, and rivers in the desert.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

Remember ye not the former things, neither consider the things of old. Behold, I will do a new thing; now it shall spring forth; shall ye not know it? I will even make a way in the wilderness, and rivers in the desert.

GOD is not finished. Whatever disappointment lies behind you — the door that closed, the season that was hard — do not pitch your tent there. GOD is speaking of a new thing. It is already springing forth. Can you see it?

Perseverance is not gritting your teeth and enduring. It is trusting that THE LORD who made a way before is making a way now. The wilderness does not have the final word. The desert does not define your future. GOD makes rivers where there was only dry ground.

I command every force of stagnation over your life to break today, IJMN. Your new thing SHALL spring forth. You shall not be stranded. It shall come to pass. Halleluyah.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: And Samuel said, Hath the LORD as great delight in burnt offerings and sacrifices, as in obeying the voice of the LORD? Behold, to obey is better than sacrifice, and to hearken than the fat of rams.
devotional:
Beloved,

Hath the LORD as great delight in burnt offerings and sacrifices, as in obeying the voice of the LORD? Behold, to obey is better than sacrifice, and to hearken than the fat of rams.

GOD is not looking for the most impressive offering. HE is looking for an obedient heart. Saul had activity. Saul had sacrifice. But Saul did not have obedience. And in the end, activity without obedience is only noise.

Character is not built in public moments. It is built in the private decisions — when no one is watching, when the instruction is inconvenient, when partial obedience seems close enough. It is not close enough. GOD sees the whole picture.

Be a peculiar vessel. Set apart not merely by what you carry, but by the integrity with which you carry it. HE who called you is worthy of full obedience.

I pray today that your heart is aligned with GOD'S instruction in every area of your life, IJMN. You SHALL not lose your place through disobedience. Character shall be your portion. To God be the glory.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: This I say then, Walk in the Spirit, and ye shall not fulfil the lust of the flesh.
devotional:
Beloved,

"This I say then, Walk in the Spirit, and ye shall not fulfil the lust of the flesh." — Galatians 5:16

Character is not built in a moment. It is built in the daily decision to walk with GOD rather than walk with self. The flesh is loud. The Spirit is steady. Choose the steady voice.

Every man and woman of God must understand this: what you feed will grow. Feed your spirit through the Word, through prayer, through fellowship with THE HOLY SPIRIT.

Your character is your testimony before the world opens its mouth to speak about you. Guard it.

I declare today that you shall walk in the Spirit and not in the counsel of the flesh. Every appetite that wars against your calling, I command it silenced IJMN. Your life shall reflect the nature of CHRIST.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: He hath shewed thee, O man, what is good; and what doth the LORD require of thee, but to do justly, and to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God?
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

"He hath shewed thee, O man, what is good; and what doth the LORD require of thee, but to do justly, and to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God?" — Micah 6:8

GOD has not hidden HIS requirements. Three things: justice, mercy, humility. These are not suggestions. They are the architecture of a life that pleases GOD.

Many are seeking great signs and great platforms. But THE LORD is first watching how you treat the person in front of you today.

Character is what you do when no one of influence is watching. GOD is always watching. Walk accordingly.

I pray today that justice, mercy and humility shall be the marks of your life. I declare that your character shall open doors that no connection of man could open IJMN. To God be the glory.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: I will praise thee, O LORD, with my whole heart; I will shew forth all thy marvellous works. I will be glad and rejoice in thee: I will sing praise to thy name, O thou most High.
devotional:
Beloved,

"I will praise thee, O LORD, with my whole heart; I will shew forth all thy marvellous works. I will be glad and rejoice in thee: I will sing praise to thy name, O thou most High." — Psalm 9:1-2

David said, I WILL. Three times. Praise is a decision before it becomes a feeling. Do not wait until the feeling arrives. Make the decision first.

Your whole heart. Not the convenient portion. Not what remains after worry has taken its share. THE LORD deserves the whole.

Halleluyah. HE is still Most High. HIS marvellous works in your life are too many to number. Begin to count them.

I declare that a spirit of genuine praise shall rest upon you today. Every heaviness of spirit, I command it to lift IJMN. You shall rejoice and your rejoicing shall be your strength.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: In every thing give thanks: for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus concerning you.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

"In every thing give thanks: for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus concerning you." — 1 Thessalonians 5:18

In EVERY thing. Not only the pleasant things. Not only when the result came as you prayed. In every thing.

Gratitude is an act of faith. When you give thanks in a hard season, you are declaring that GOD is still GOD over that season. That HE has not abandoned HIS post.

This is the will of GOD concerning you. You cannot be in the will of GOD and be a stranger to gratitude. The two cannot be separated.

I pray today that a heart of true gratitude shall be your portion. I declare that your thanksgiving shall become a gate through which fresh blessings enter your life IJMN. To God be the glory.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.
devotional:
Beloved,

"God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble." — Psalm 46:1

Not a distant help. Not a help that must be summoned from afar. A VERY PRESENT help. HE is already there before the trouble announces itself to you.

You are peculiar to GOD. HE takes your protection personally. No weapon, no plot, no darkness formed against HIS own shall prosper.

Run into HIM today. HE is your refuge. HE is your strength. Your source will never run dry because your source is GOD HIMSELF. Halleluyah.

I command every threat against your life, your home and your destiny to scatter now IJMN. I declare that you are covered. You shall dwell safely and no evil shall come near your dwelling. Keeping you lifted in prayer.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God, to them who are the called according to his purpose.
devotional:
Beloved,

Romans 8:28
"And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God, to them who are the called according to his purpose."

Notice the Apostle Paul does not say some things. He says ALL THINGS. The difficulty you are carrying today is not outside the reach of GOD'S purpose. It is inside it.

Perseverance is not blind stubbornness. It is faith that has read this verse and believed it. You are not abandoned in your trial. You are being worked on.

Keep standing. THE LORD is not finished.

I declare today that every hard thing in your life SHALL turn. Your tears are not wasted. Your waiting is not wasted. GOD is working all of it together for your good, IJMN.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith,
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

Galatians 5:22
"But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith,"

Joy is listed here as fruit, not as feeling. Fruit is grown. Fruit is produced from within. This means your joy does not depend on what is happening around you today.

When THE HOLY SPIRIT is alive in you, HE produces joy that circumstances cannot touch. The world did not give it. The world cannot take it.

Walk today in that joy. It is already inside you. It belongs to you. Halleluyah.

I pray today that the joy of THE LORD rises strong in you. What tried to steal it SHALL be defeated. Your countenance SHALL lift, IJMN.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: O give thanks unto the LORD; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
devotional:
Beloved,

Psalm 136:1
"O give thanks unto the LORD; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever."

The Psalmist repeats one refrain through all twenty-six verses of this chapter: HIS mercy endureth for ever. He says it again and again until it settles in the heart.

GOD'S love is not seasonal. It does not reduce when you fail. It does not expire when circumstances are difficult. It endures.

Let that truth be the ground you stand on today. To God be the glory.

I declare that you SHALL walk in the full knowledge of GOD'S love today. It SHALL guard you. It SHALL sustain you. It endures for ever over your life, IJMN.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: It is of the LORD'S mercies that we are not consumed, because his compassions fail not. They are new every morning: great is thy faithfulness.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

Lamentations 3:22-23
"It is of the LORD'S mercies that we are not consumed, because his compassions fail not. They are new every morning: great is thy faithfulness."

Jeremiah wrote this from the middle of devastation. Yet even there, he found the love of GOD. That is a peculiar kind of testimony.

This morning is a new morning. The mercies that carried you yesterday have been renewed. You are not living on yesterday's grace. Fresh compassion has arrived for today.

Receive it. Walk in it. Halleluyah.

I pray today that you feel the fresh mercy of GOD upon your life. Every burden that is too heavy SHALL be lifted. Your source will never run dry, IJMN.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: The horse is prepared against the day of battle: but safety is of the LORD.
devotional:
Beloved,

Proverbs 21:31
"The horse is prepared against the day of battle: but safety is of the LORD."

Do your preparation. Work with diligence. Plan with wisdom. GOD does not honour laziness dressed as faith. But when you have done all you can do, remember where your victory comes from.

Safety is of THE LORD. Not of the horse. Not of strategy alone. The final word in every battle belongs to HIM.

You are a peculiar people. Your victory is not by your might. It is by HIS hand.

I command every opposition arranged against you to fall. Your week SHALL be victorious. The battle is THE LORD'S and the victory is yours, IJMN.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: A friend loveth at all times, and a brother is born for adversity.
devotional:
Beloved,

A friend loveth at all times, and a brother is born for adversity.
— Proverbs 17:17

GOD did not place you in a family by accident. Every brother, every sister, every relation — they are a divine assignment. Family is not merely blood. It is covenant. It is the place where love is tested and proven true.

When adversity comes — and it will come — family is the shelter GOD ordained before the storm arrived. Do not take them for granted. Honour them. Pray for them. Be the brother, the sister, the friend that this verse describes.

Your family is a peculiar gift from THE LORD. Protect it.

I declare today that every bond of family over your life is strengthened by the hand of GOD IJMN. I command every spirit of division to flee from your household. Your home SHALL be a place of love, loyalty and divine covering.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: He that overcometh shall inherit all things; and I will be his God, and he shall be my son.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

He that overcometh shall inherit all things; and I will be his God, and he shall be my son.
— Revelation 21:7

The promise is not to the one who merely survives. It is to the one who OVERCOMES. There is a difference. To overcome is to face the trial, face the enemy, face the darkness — and still stand on the side of GOD when it is finished.

You are an overcomer. Not because you have not suffered. But because THE LORD is with you in the suffering. And HIS word is settled: you SHALL inherit all things.

Halleluyah. To God be the glory.

I declare that you are numbered among the overcomers IJMN. I command every defeat, every setback, every voice that says you have lost — to be silenced today. Victory IS your inheritance. It SHALL manifest in your life.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: Let nothing be done through strife or vainglory; but in lowliness of mind let each esteem other better than themselves. Look not every man on his own things, but every man also on the things of others.
devotional:
Beloved,

Let nothing be done through strife or vainglory; but in lowliness of mind let each esteem other better than themselves.
— Philippians 2:3-4

Humility is not weakness. It is the posture that GOD blesses. The man who stoops to serve is the man GOD lifts. Do not be deceived by the noise of pride around you. Vainglory produces nothing of eternal value.

To esteem others is a discipline. It will not always feel natural. But it is the way of CHRIST, and it is the way of peace. THE HOLY SPIRIT will help you walk in it, if you ask HIM.

I pray today that THE LORD roots out every seed of pride and vainglory from your heart IJMN. I declare a spirit of genuine humility over your life. You SHALL be great, because you have chosen the low place before GOD.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: And not only so, but we glory in tribulations also: knowing that tribulation worketh patience; and patience, experience; and experience, hope: and hope maketh not ashamed; because the love of God is shed abroad in our hearts by the Holy Ghost which is given unto us.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

And not only so, but we glory in tribulations also: knowing that tribulation worketh patience; and patience, experience; and experience, hope.
— Romans 5:3-5

What the enemy sends to break you, GOD is using to build you. Tribulation is not the end of the road. It is the road itself — the very path by which character is formed and hope is established.

Do not despise this season of pressure. Inside it, patience is being born. Inside patience, experience. Inside experience, a hope that WILL NOT shame you. THE HOLY GHOST has seen to it.

Halleluyah.

I declare that every tribulation in your life is working FOR you and not against you IJMN. I pray today that patience and hope rise strong within you. Your source will never run dry. It SHALL be well.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: I will both lay me down in peace, and sleep: for thou, LORD, only makest me dwell in safety.
devotional:
Beloved,

I will both lay me down in peace, and sleep: for thou, LORD, only makest me dwell in safety.
— Psalm 4:8

Peace is not the absence of trouble. It is the presence of GOD in the middle of the trouble. David wrote this while enemies surrounded him. Yet he slept. That is the peculiar peace of THE LORD — it guards you when circumstances cannot.

You do not need to carry tonight what GOD has already covered. Lay it down. HE neither slumbers nor sleeps, and HE is watching over you. Rest is an act of faith.

I command every spirit of fear, restlessness and anxiety to depart from you tonight IJMN. I declare the peace of GOD, which passeth all understanding, over your mind and your household. You SHALL dwell in safety. Keeping you lifted in prayer.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: If my people, which are called by my name, shall humble themselves, and pray, and seek my face, and turn from their wicked ways; then will I hear from heaven, and will forgive their sin, and will heal their land.
devotional:
Beloved,

2 Chronicles 7:14
"If my people, which are called by my name, shall humble themselves, and pray, and seek my face, and turn from their wicked ways; then will I hear from heaven, and will forgive their sin, and will heal their land."

GOD does not ask for performance. HE asks for humility. When we bow before HIM in sincerity, HE moves on our behalf. This scripture is a covenant promise. It has conditions and it has rewards.

Prayer is not the last resort of a desperate man. It is the first position of a wise one. The instruction is clear: humble yourself, seek HIS face, and turn. GOD HIMSELF will do the rest.

Your household, your nation, your situation — none of it is beyond HIS reach. HE said HE will hear. HE said HE will forgive. HE said HE will heal. Take HIM at HIS word today.

I declare today that as you bow before THE LORD in prayer, IJMN, HE will hear your voice from heaven. Every broken thing in your life and your land shall be restored. GOD's covenant over you shall not fail.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: That it might be fulfilled which was spoken by Esaias the prophet, saying, Himself took our infirmities, and bare our sicknesses.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

Matthew 8:17
"That it might be fulfilled which was spoken by Esaias the prophet, saying, Himself took our infirmities, and bare our sicknesses."

Healing is not an afterthought in the Gospel. It is woven into the very work of CHRIST on the cross. JESUS did not merely sympathise with the sick. HE carried their sickness HIMSELF. That is the depth of HIS love.

Whatever your body is carrying today, know this: it was already borne by ANOTHER. You do not fight for healing as one who has no claim. You stand on a finished work.

I command every infirmity that has attached itself to your body to release you now, IJMN. You are not a victim of sickness. You are a child of THE HEALER. Halleluyah. To God be the glory.

I declare today that the healing power of JESUS CHRIST is active in your body right now. Every report that contradicts HIS word is overturned. You shall be whole, IJMN.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
devotional:
Beloved,

Psalm 23:1
"The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want."

Notice that David did not say THE LORD will be his shepherd. He said THE LORD IS. Present tense. Active. Continuous. The provision and protection of GOD over your life is not a future promise alone — it is a present reality.

A shepherd does not abandon his flock at nightfall. He does not leave when the path becomes difficult. THE LORD watches over you in every season. Your source will never run dry.

You shall not lack. Not today, not this week, not this season. That word "want" covers everything — provision, peace, direction, health. HE is YOUR shepherd.

I declare today that because THE LORD is your shepherd, every need in your life is covered by HIS hand. You shall not beg. You shall not be forsaken. HIS rod and HIS staff are over you now, IJMN.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no more: for thou art with me; thy rod and thy staff they comfort me.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

Psalm 23:4
"Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no more: for thou art with me; thy rod and thy staff they comfort me."

David did not say he would never pass through a valley. He said he would pass THROUGH it. The valley is not your destination. It is a passage. And you do not walk it alone.

GOD's protection is not the absence of difficulty. It is HIS presence in the midst of it. The rod defends. The staff guides. Both are in HIS hands and HIS hands are on you.

Fear has no legal ground in your life. THE LORD is with you. What shadow can stand against HIS light? I command every spirit of fear to leave you now, IJMN. You are a peculiar child of THE MOST HIGH.

I declare today that you shall pass through every valley safely. No weapon of darkness shall prosper against you. GOD HIMSELF is your rear guard and your shield, IJMN. Halleluyah.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: The LORD is nigh unto them that are of a broken heart; and saveth such as be of a contrite spirit.
devotional:
Beloved,

Psalm 34:18
"The LORD is nigh unto them that are of a broken heart; and saveth such as be of a contrite spirit."

Some of us have been taught that brokenness is weakness. GOD's word says something different. It is in our brokenness that HE draws nearest. HE does not stand far off from the wounded. HE moves toward them.

If your heart is heavy today, you are not hidden from GOD. You are not forgotten. You are not too far gone. HIS love is not conditional on your strength. It is constant in your weakness.

HE saves. HE heals. HE restores the contrite spirit. To God be the glory for a love that never fails and a mercy that never expires. Keeping you lifted in prayer.

I pray today that every broken heart reading these words is touched by the healing love of THE FATHER. Your pain shall become your testimony. GOD is nigh unto you, and HE shall save you, IJMN. Halleluyah.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: So then faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of God.
devotional:
Beloved,

So then faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of God. — Romans 10:17

Faith is not manufactured in the mind of man. It is deposited by GOD HIMSELF through HIS word. Every time you open that Bible, faith is being built in you. Do not neglect it.

Many are waiting for a feeling before they believe. But faith comes first, and the feeling follows. Feed on the word daily. Let it dwell in you richly.

Your faith SHALL increase this season. What GOD has spoken over your life SHALL come to pass. HE is not a man that HE should lie.

Good Morning to us all,

And the LORD shall guide thee continually, and satisfy thy soul in drought, and make fat thy bones: and thou shalt be like a watered garden, and like a spring of water, whose waters fail not.
— Isaiah 58:11

This is not a seasonal promise. THE LORD shall guide thee CONTINUALLY. Even in drought — when the economy is dry, when the season is hard — HE satisfies. That is a peculiar grace for a peculiar people.

Your source is not man. Your source is not a system. Your source is GOD HIMSELF. And that source shall never run dry. To GOD be the glory.

I command every drought over your finances, your health, and your household to end today. Your source will never run dry. You SHALL be a spring that refreshes others IJMN.

verse: Shew me thy ways, O LORD; teach me thy paths. Lead me in thy truth, and teach me: for thou art the God of my salvation; on thee do I wait all the day.

Beloved,

Shew me thy ways, O LORD; teach me thy paths. Lead me in thy truth, and teach me: for thou art the God of my salvation; on thee do I wait all the day.
— Psalm 25:4–5

David was a king, yet he prayed as a student. That is wisdom. The man who thinks he already knows enough has closed himself to GOD's further instruction. True wisdom begins where self-sufficiency ends.

Wait on THE LORD. Not once. Not in the morning only. All the day. HIS truth is the only path that does not disappoint. Let HIM lead you. Keeping you lifted in prayer.

I pray today that THE HOLY SPIRIT SHALL be your teacher and your guide. Wisdom SHALL govern your decisions. You SHALL not miss your path IJMN.

verse: He staggered not at the promise of God through unbelief; but was strong in faith, giving glory to God; And being fully persuaded that, what he had promised, he was able also to perform.

"He staggered not at the promise of God through unbelief; but was strong in faith, giving glory to God; And being fully persuaded that, what he had promised, he was able also to perform."

Abraham did not stagger. He did not calculate the odds against him. He simply held the promise of GOD and refused to let it go. That is the definition of faith — not the absence of difficulty, but the refusal to be moved by it.

GOD has spoken over your life. What HE has promised, HE is able to perform. The question is not whether GOD is capable. The question is whether you will remain fully persuaded. Stand firm today.

Your faith is not in vain. It shall produce its full reward, IJMN.

I declare that you shall not stagger at the promises of GOD over your life. Every word HE has spoken concerning you SHALL come to pass. You are fully persuaded, and your faith SHALL not fail. To God be the glory.

devotional:
Beloved,

Zechariah 4:6
"Not by might, nor by power, but by my spirit, saith the LORD of hosts."

Zerubbabel faced a mountain. GOD did not send him more soldiers or more resources. HE sent HIS SPIRIT. That was enough. It is always enough.

Whatever mountain stands before you today, human effort alone will not move it. Strategy alone will not move it. But THE HOLY SPIRIT — HE moves mountains.

Yield to HIM. Make room for HIM. Every assignment HE places upon you, HE supplies the power to fulfil. Your source will never run dry.

I command every mountain before you to be removed by the power of THE HOLY SPIRIT IJMN. I declare supernatural empowerment over your life and work today. Keeping you lifted in prayer.

verse: So then faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of God.
devotional:
Beloved,

So then faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of God. — Romans 10:17

Faith is not manufactured. It is received. Every time you open this word and read it, faith is being deposited into your spirit. Do not neglect it.

The enemy knows this. That is why he will fill your day with noise, distraction, and busyness — anything to keep you from hearing GOD speak. Guard your time with HIS word jealously.

You are what you hear consistently. Let the word of GOD be the loudest voice in your life.

I declare today that the word of GOD shall take root in your heart and produce faith that moves mountains IJMN. Your ears shall be tuned to HIS voice alone. It shall be well with you.

verse: But the wisdom that is from above is first pure, then peaceable, gentle, and easy to be intreated, full of mercy and good fruits, without partiality, and without hypocrisy.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

But the wisdom that is from above is first pure, then peaceable, gentle, and easy to be intreated, full of mercy and good fruits, without partiality, and without hypocrisy. — James 3:17

Not every wisdom is from GOD. James teaches us to test it. The wisdom from above does not create confusion. It does not exalt itself. It bears fruit that is visible and good.

When you face decisions this week, pause. Ask yourself — is this peaceable? Is this pure? If it requires you to deceive or to harm, it is not from above.

Seek HIM. HE gives wisdom generously to all who ask in faith.

I pray today that the LORD grants you HIS wisdom in every matter before you. You shall not be led astray. Every decision of your hands shall yield good fruit IJMN. To God be the glory.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: And when Jesus saw her, he called her to him, and said unto her, Woman, thou art loosed from thine infirmity.
devotional:
Beloved,

And when Jesus saw her, he called her to him, and said unto her, Woman, thou art loosed from thine infirmity. — Luke 13:12

This woman had been bowed down for eighteen years. JESUS did not ask how long. HE did not request a medical report. HE saw her, HE called her, and HE spoke — and it was done.

There is someone reading this today who has been bowed down. In your body, in your home, in your finances. I want you to know that JESUS still sees. HE is calling you to HIM right now.

Your infirmity does not have the final word. HE does.

I command every burden pressing you down to release you NOW, in the name of JESUS. You are loosed from your infirmity IJMN. Straighten up and glorify GOD. Halleluyah.

HAVE A BEAUTIFUL DAY
Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

verse: For the word of God is quick, and powerful, and sharper than any twoedged sword, piercing even to the dividing asunder of soul and spirit, and of the joints and marrow, and is a discerner of the thoughts and intents of the heart.

Good Morning to us all,

The word of GOD is not a relic. It is alive. It is active. It is working right now, in the heart of every believer who will receive it.

No weapon formed against you is sharper than this word. No lie, no fear, no stronghold can withstand it. When darkness surrounds you, open your Bible. Speak what is written. GOD's word does not return void.

This is your inheritance. Do not leave it untouched.

I declare today that the living word of GOD shall cut through every obstacle in your path IJMN. Every stronghold shall fall. Your source will never run dry because HIS word sustains you. Keeping you lifted in prayer.

verse: Bless the LORD, O my soul: and all that is within me, bless his holy name.
devotional:
Beloved,

Bless the LORD, O my soul: and all that is within me, bless his holy name. — Psalm 103:1

David did not wait for perfect circumstances before he praised GOD. He commanded his own soul to bless THE LORD. This is a peculiar discipline — the discipline of praise.

Your soul may be tired. Your situation may not yet have changed. But you have breath. You have this day. These alone are reason enough to lift HIS name.

When praise goes up, HIS presence comes down. Enter this day with worship on your lips.

I pray today that praise shall arise from your spirit like a garment that never leaves you IJMN. Your week SHALL be marked by the glory of GOD. Halleluyah — to God be the glory.

Beloved,

"How much better is it to get wisdom than gold! and to get understanding rather to be chosen than silver!"

Do not despise the season of learning. Do not rush past the altar of prayer seeking only material gain. Seek HIM first. Understanding comes from HIS presence.

Gold will perish. Wisdom endures.

I declare today that wisdom is your portion. I command every spirit of foolishness and confusion to depart from your life IJMN. Your mind is sharpened, your path is clear, and the counsel of THE LORD shall direct your steps all the days of your life.

Good Morning to us all,

2 Timothy 4:5
"But watch thou in all things, endure afflictions, do the work of an evangelist, make full proof of thy ministry."

Paul did not promise Timothy comfort. He promised him a calling. These are not the same thing. To make full proof of your ministry means to finish what GOD assigned to you — completely, faithfully, without retreat.

Afflictions will come. Watch and do not be moved. Your mission is not cancelled because the road is difficult. It is confirmed.

Halleluyah — GOD does not call the qualified. HE qualifies the called.

I pray today that you shall not abandon your post IJMN. I declare that every affliction designed to break your purpose shall become the very fuel that drives your calling forward. You SHALL finish your race. To God be the glory.

verse: Give, and it shall be given unto you; good measure, pressed down, and shaken together, and running over, shall men give into your bosom. For with the same measure that ye mete withal it shall be measured to you again.
devotional:
Beloved,

Luke 6:38
"Give, and it shall be given unto you; good measure, pressed down, and shaken together, and running over, shall men give into your bosom."

Your source will never run dry when you honour GOD with what HE has placed in your hands. Give in faith. Give without fear.

I declare today that as you give, heaven's measure is released upon your life IJMN. I command scarcity to be broken from your household. Provision shall locate you — pressed down, shaken together, and running over. It shall be so.

Halleluyah. What a GOD.

1 Peter 2:9

Your associations are your acceleration — or your destruction. Choose wisely, IJMN.

JESUS did not promise us a road without difficulty. HE promised us a peace that surpasses the difficulty. That is the covenant.

Beloved,

Every word of God is pure: he is a shield unto them that put their trust in him.

The peace we carry is not produced by our circumstances. It flows from our standing before GOD. We have been justified — declared righteous — through JESUS CHRIST. That verdict is settled.

Walk in that peace today. It belongs to you. Halleluyah.

I declare today that the peace of GOD guards your heart and your mind. Anxiety SHALL not rule over you. Your source will never run dry. You are at peace with GOD, and GOD is for you, IJMN.

Beloved,

"If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins, and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness."

Confession is not punishment. It is the doorway. When you open your mouth and speak the truth before GOD, HE does not hesitate. HE is faithful. HE is just. Both attributes move together in your favour.

You are not too far gone. No sin is too great for the blood of JESUS to cover. Come as you are. GOD's grace is greater than your history. It shall wash you clean today, IJMN.

"And I will restore to you the years that the locust hath eaten, the cankerworm, and the caterpiller, and the palmerworm, my great army which I sent among you."
— Joel 2:25

GOD is a GOD of restoration. Not partial restoration. Full restoration. Every year the enemy stole, every season that was wasted, every opportunity that was devoured — GOD says HE will give it back. HIS word does not say HE will try. HE says HE WILL.

Notice that GOD lists each pest by name. HE sees every specific thing that was taken from you. Nothing is hidden from HIM. Nothing is forgotten by HIM. HE is precise in HIS restoration.

Reverend Edward Koye-Ladele

Beloved,

"But he was wounded for our transgressions, he was bruised for our iniquities: the chastisement of our peace was upon him; and with his stripes we are healed."

Healing is not a promise GOD is still considering. It was purchased. The price was paid on the body of JESUS CHRIST before you ever fell ill. That word — "we ARE healed" — is present tense. It is already settled in the realm of the spirit.

Every stripe on HIS back was not an accident. It was an exchange. HE took the pain so you could carry the wholeness. Do not allow the enemy to tell you that sickness is your portion. It is not.

Today, stand on this word. The body of CHRIST is your legal ground for healing. What the enemy has afflicted, THE LORD has already answered, IJMN.

verse: Be merciful unto me, O God, be merciful unto me: for my soul trusteth in thee: yea, in the shadow of thy wings will I make my refuge, until these calamities be overpast.
devotional:
Good Morning to us all,

"Be merciful unto me, O God, be merciful unto me: for my soul trusteth in thee: yea, in the shadow of thy wings will I make my refuge, until these calamities be overpast."
— Psalm 57:1

David wrote this psalm while hiding in a cave, with enemies all around him. Yet his first move was not to plan an escape. His first move was to run to GOD. That is the posture of a man who understands where protection truly comes from.

The shadow of HIS wings is not a metaphor for comfort alone. It is a covering that the enemy cannot penetrate. You may be in a difficult season. Calamity may feel close. But you are not exposed. You are covered.

Notice David says "until these calamities be overpast." Every trial has an expiry. GOD's protection holds until it is finished, IJMN. Your source will never run dry.

I pray today that GOD's covering rests over you and your household. No weapon formed against you shall prosper. You are hidden in HIM, safe and secure, IJMN.

devotional:

This is not a prayer request. This is a covenant declaration. GOD did not say no weapon would be formed. Weapons will be formed. The enemy is not inactive. But GOD says not one of them SHALL prosper. There is a difference between formation and function.

As this season closes, I want you to know: you are a victor. Not by your own strength, but by the covenant you carry, IJMN. Halleluyah. To God be the glory.
